items.name: Quick Potion
items.description: Zoom zoom!!!

items.name: Korblox Krossbow
items.description: The Korblox Krossbows are powerful against all enemies.  Use the secret move, and it's unstoppable.

items.name: Festive Artemis Bow
items.description: Because- why not? When fired, arrows leave a candy cane beam trailing behind. Randomly colored ornaments spawn around where the arrow hit. This is one festive range attacked!

items.name: Vanishing Ninja Star
items.description: "Your foes won't even know what hit 'em. They won't even see it coming." - Stickmasterluke

items.name: Sword of the Lands
items.description: Strike a blow for land kind when you use the Sword of the Lands!  Each hit will do 15 damage.  Hit the 'Q' key to create a giant land mass to raise you up towards the heavens and surround yourself with Earth, which you then fire at your foes below.

items.name: Wraith's Screech Potion
items.description: His scream pierces all that come near him.

items.name: Dragon's Breath Potion
items.description: Yeah this does exactly what you think it does. Drink it and you can shoot flames at anything and everything!

items.name: ROBLOXIAN Damage Orb
items.description: Equip these and leave them by pressing 'Q' in your wake—they only do 20 hit points of damage to other players, but each time they hit an orb, you gain a 60% speed buff!

items.name: Lightning Horn of the Heavens
items.description: Click to summon massive lightning from the heavens.  Anyone close to a strike will be knocked to the ground and blown away from it, doing an additional 20 damage. Anyone directly hit will take 100 damage!

items.name: Implosion Bomb
items.description: Click once and then toss the bomb onto the ground- away from yourself of course! The implosion bomb will beep for five seconds and then implode. Everything flies inward and anyone hit will take 100 damage points!

items.name: Snowplow
items.description: Click on a player to chase them with your snowplow and push them away from you.

items.name: Motherboard Sword
items.description: Send them crying for their mother(boards) faster than you can say nanoprocesser.

items.name: Treacherous Throwing Knives
items.description: Dagger, dagger, dagger! Made for throwing only, click to launch three daggers at your foes.

items.name: RobloTim's RobloHunk Potion
items.description: Want to be the next superstar in town? Then this potion is for you! Brewed by our very own RobloTim, this potion make you into a solid weight lifting champion. Huge muscles, strong arms and giving + 100% health and movement speed! Once transformed you can use other gear to fight or show off!

items.name: Festive Dual Plungers
items.description: Rapidly fire your very own holiday decorated dual plungers!  Each plunger does 14 damage!

items.name: The Necrosapien Staff
items.description: It's Latin. Look it up. Necromancers are supposed to like Latin.

items.name: Sword of the Autumnal Winds
items.description: Leafing your enemies in your dust....

items.name: Keytar Sword
items.description: This electro-axe is a sword!

items.name: Staff of the Raging Storm
items.description: The storm that rages within is now external.

items.name: Inglaciator -6000
items.description: Why -6000?  Because it launches an icy sphere of doom that is -6000 degrees.  Click and hold to charge up your icy projectile and release to launch it. When your ice hits - it will create an icy ball that grows over time. Anyone hit by the ice will take 30 damage.  Your foes' chances of survival? Absolute zero.

items.name: Wooden Dreidel
items.description:
I have a little dreidel /
I made it out of clay /
And when it's dry and ready /
Then dreidel I shall play! /
PS - This dreidel is actually made out of wood, but the dreidel song was obligatory - Spin the dreidel and see how many chocolate coins you win!

items.name: Laser Lava Launcher
items.description: This powerful gun unleashes deadly beams of lava directly at your opponent. Click and hold to charge the beam.  The longer you charge, the more damage it deals!

items.name: Glory Launcher 2012
items.description: With this heat seeking missile launcher, your foes don't stand a chance.

items.name: Annoying Elf: Keith
items.description: These elves have a mind of their own!  Keith is no exception.  And he's got matches - I smell trouble...and hot dogs?

items.name: Superhero Potion
items.description: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a flying Robloxian shooting fireballs?

items.name: Kittypult
items.description: Fire fierce, angry, scratching cats at other players.  Warning - do not try this in real life.

items.name: Dragonheart Sword & Shield
items.description: The boldest of the bold, fight with the greedy heart of a dragon.  Swing and lunge at your enemies or press 'Q' to block damage.

items.name: Inflatable Sword
items.description: A classic April Fool's prank from medieval times was to swap a friend’s sword for an inflatable one. They rarely got the point, though.

items.name: Summer Hang Glider
items.description: Soaring through the sky all summer long!

items.name: Dark Alien Hatchling
items.description: When you see this egg - you better run!  As soon as the alien hatches, it's too late!
